description: Test directive splices inside quoted strings (original cases + new splice cases)

assertions.description: Original: outer directive has correct scope
Original: directive splice inside string has correct scope
Original: directive splice inside string still has string parent scope
Original: second outer directive has correct scope
Original: directive splice inside string (with trailing text) has correct scope
Original: text after directive splice still has string scope
New splice (braces): outer directive has correct scope
New splice (braces): directive splice inside string has correct scope
New splice (braces): directive splice inside string still has string parent scope
New splice (braces): opening brace after splice directive is highlighted
New splice (braces): closing brace after splice directive is highlighted
New splice (parens): outer directive has correct scope
New splice (parens): splice directive with argument group has correct scope
New splice (parens): opening parenthesis after splice directive is highlighted
New splice (parens): numeric literal inside splice argument group is highlighted
New splice (parens): closing parenthesis after splice directive is highlighted
New splice (parens): splice directive in line still has string parent scope
